## Q1：现在有个问题，比如创建课程要求输入图片链接。如果用户给了一个外部网站的逻辑。我其实是需要转存到自己系统的素材库里的。以下是前端WEB直传的方式，看看如何在 CLI 里接入。

1. 获取 OSS 上传签名
curl 'https://kpapi-cs.ckjr001.com/api/admin/assets/imageSign?type=2' \
  -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'accept-language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..g2AZ6TBBmAopBbK3Z2LtzRUmrNEKTBQJ3KiLWOcjCAI' \
  -H 'cache-control: no-cache' \
  -H 'origin: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com' \
  -H 'pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
  -H 'referer: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com/' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-dest: empty' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-mode: cors' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-site: cross-site' \
  -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'x-dmp: u=24068&c=lj7l&url=%2Fcontent%2Fknowledge%2Fcourses%2Fvideos%2F15427478%2Fedit%2F-1%2F-1%2F-1&chl=adm'

2. 前端 web 直传
curl 'https://knowledge-payment.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/' \
  -H 'Accept: */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap' \
  -H 'Origin: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com' \
  -H 'Pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'Referer: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com/' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \
  -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  --data-raw $'------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="key"\r\n\r\nlj7l/resource/imgs/eeb49984/admin-fe_lj7l_uploadBox_NKeA7jzJKNZCRr6DTpFW.png\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="policy"\r\n\r\\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="OSSAccessKeyId"\r\n\r\nLTAIEooZEnvlRbrb\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="success_action_status"\r\n\r\n200\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="callback"\r\n\r\\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="signature"\r\n\r\nxLBXSICzAYMnBqjdWNdRwaxcU5Q=\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="origin"\r\n\r\n0\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="name"\r\n\r\navatar_1.png\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="x:realname"\r\n\r\navatar_1\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="avatar_1.png"\r\nContent-Type: image/png\r\n\r\n\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryI3cZzS7LyZdMDxap--\r\n'

3. 保存到素材库
curl 'https://kpapi-cs.ckjr001.com/api/admin/assets/addImgInAsset' \
  -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'accept-language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..g2AZ6TBBmAopBbK3Z2LtzRUmrNEKTBQJ3KiLWOcjCAI' \
  -H 'cache-control: no-cache' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json;charset=UTF-8' \
  -H 'origin: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com' \
  -H 'pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
  -H 'referer: https://lecturercs.myckjr.com/' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-dest: empty' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-mode: cors' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-site: cross-site' \
  -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'x-dmp: u=24068&c=lj7l&url=%2Fcontent%2Fknowledge%2Fcourses%2Fvideos%2F15427478%2Fedit%2F-1%2F-1%2F-1&chl=adm' \
  --data-raw '{"data":[{"fId":-1,"level":1,"parentId":0,"size":0.10506343841552734,"height":"512","width":"512","suffix":".png","name":"avatar_1","imageUrl":"https://knowledge-payment.oss-cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/lj7l/resource/imgs/eeb49984/admin-fe_lj7l_uploadBox_NKeA7jzJKNZCRr6DTpFW.png"}]}'


## Q2: 现在要区分测试环境和生产环境使用的以下两个域名，有什么方案吗？

正式使用的 baseUrl
curl 'https://kpapi0.kw.ckjr.cn/api/admin/assets/imageSign?fId=-1&level=1&parentId=0&type=2' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ugbq_BEneOuekEJtpwPwkctH-gYkyPpGFIPe7yEwIy0' \
  -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Origin: https://admin.ckjr001.com' \
  -H 'Pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'Referer: https://admin.ckjr001.com/' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \
  -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'X-DMP: u=921481&c=nkqe&url=%2Fshop%2FshopManage%2FuploadImage%2FImage%2F-1%2F0%2F1&chl=adm' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"'

正式环境使用的 OSS 域名
curl 'https://ck-bkt-knowledge-payment.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/' \
  -H 'Accept: */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN' \
  -H 'Origin: https://admin.ckjr001.com' \
  -H 'Pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'Referer: https://admin.ckjr001.com/' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \
  -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  --data-raw $'------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="key"\r\n\r\nnkqe/resource/imgs/eeb49984/admin-fe_nkqe_material_r4zSKmwiyJAersM5crkr.png\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="policy"\r\n\r\\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="OSSAccessKeyId"\r\n\r\nLTAIKL8scFqjGkvu\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="success_action_status"\r\n\r\n200\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="callback"\r\n\r\\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="signature"\r\n\r\nTl6XtMY8sHMe0m/GZkYujq97Lcc=\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="origin"\r\n\r\n0\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="name"\r\n\r\navatar_3.png\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="x:realname"\r\n\r\navatar_3\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="avatar_3.png"\r\nContent-Type: image/png\r\n\r\n\r\n------WebKitFormBoundaryKZcKy1mrr9r5M8xN--\r\n'

正式使用的 baseUrl
curl 'https://kpapi0.kw.ckjr.cn/api/admin/assets/addImgInAsset' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ugbq_BEneOuekEJtpwPwkctH-gYkyPpGFIPe7yEwIy0' \
  -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json;charset=UTF-8' \
  -H 'Origin: https://admin.ckjr001.com' \
  -H 'Pragma: no-cache' \
  -H 'Referer: https://admin.ckjr001.com/' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \
  -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/146.0.0.0' \
  -H 'X-DMP: u=921481&c=nkqe&url=%2Fshop%2FshopManage%2FuploadImage%2FImage%2F-1%2F0%2F1&chl=adm' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="146", "Not-A.Brand";v="24", "Microsoft Edge";v="146"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  --data-raw '{"data":[{"fId":"-1","level":"1","parentId":"0","size":0.11389923095703125,"height":"512","width":"512","suffix":".png","name":"avatar_3","imageUrl":"https://ck-bkt-knowledge-payment.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/nkqe/resource/imgs/eeb49984/admin-fe_nkqe_material_r4zSKmwiyJAersM5crkr.png"}]}'


## Q3: 问题

1. route yaml 文件 response 又嵌套了一层 fields，比较费劲。在实践过程中发现不需要 fields/exclude。
2. asset workflow 也需要支持图片转存到素材库，参考 course workflow。
